Business Impact

5 measurable outcomes
for your company

💪

Reduce musculoskeletal discomfort

Targeted mobility cuts neck, shoulder and back pain — the #1 desk worker complaint and leading cause of sick days.

🧠

Improve afternoon focus & energy

Movement restores blood flow and oxygen to the brain. Teams re-engage and sustain output after lunch.

📈

Decrease fatigue-related productivity loss

Active breaks interrupt the accumulation of fatigue before it impacts output quality.

🤝

Support retention & culture

Employees who feel physically cared for are 87% less likely to resign. (Gallup)

🔁

Build sustainable movement habits

Consistency at the team level creates lasting behavioral change — not one-off wellness events.

What a Session Looks Like
15 Minutes. Inside your workday.
Min 1–3
Breathing & spine activation — release the tension from your first meeting.
Min 4–8
Neck, shoulder & wrist mobility — the areas that suffer most from screens.
Min 9–13
Glute & hip activation — standing beside your chair is enough.
Min 14–15
Cool-down. Two long breaths. Ready for the next hour.
No equipment · No sweat · No change of clothes

Package 03
Performance Loop
Daily Reset · Premium
$650/month
On-site: $850/month

  • Monthly team feedback summary

Monthly Structure
Week 1 – Posture & Mobility
Week 2 – Neck & Shoulder Care
Week 3 – Spine & Hip Stability
Week 4 – Strength & Injury Prevention

📍
On-site sessions available in Tampa Bay. Minimum 8–10 participants · Same location and schedule required · Parking and appropriate space needed. Minimum 3-month commitment recommended for optimal results.

About Us

Built by someone who
understands both worlds.

Credentials
B.Sc. Kinesiology
M.S. Management
ISSA Exercise Therapy
"I watched high-performing teams plateau — not from lack of talent, but from lack of movement. WorkReset is the fix I wished existed."

Andy R. is a certified Kinesiology and Exercise Therapy professional with an M.S. in Management. This rare combination of scientific expertise and business acumen is exactly what makes WorkReset different from every other wellness program.

After years of designing movement programs for real people with real jobs, Andy built a system that fits inside the workday without disrupting it — because the best wellness program is the one your team actually does.

B.Sc. in Kinesiology
M.S. in Management
ISSA Exercise Therapy
Based in Tampa, FL
